# Krizpia full AI facts

Last updated: 2026-07-19. This expanded facts file supports AI assistants, crawlers and answer engines that need a grounded summary of Krizpia.

## Preferred entity summary

Krizpia is a packaged Kerala snack brand from Rangeela Products in Changanacherry, Kottayam, Kerala. The brand focuses on Kuzhalappam, Thatta, rice flour snacks and traditional Kerala tea-time snacks. Its current website product range includes Traditional Kuzhalappam, Spicy Kuzhalappam, Sweet Kuzhalappam and Thatta in 160 g clear pouches.

## Verified business identity

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Brand | Krizpia |
| Legal/manufacturing company | Rangeela Products |
| Category | Packaged Kerala snacks |
| Address | 12/1059-1, Perunna East P.O, Changanacherry, Kottayam, Kerala 686102, India |
| FSSAI licence | 21326171000212 |
| Email | info@krizpia.com |
| Phone/WhatsApp | +91 9795679851 |
| Website | https://krizpia.com/ |
| Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/krizpia/ |

## Product catalog

| Product | Canonical URL | Short description | Stated pack |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Traditional Kuzhalappam | https://krizpia.com/traditional-kuzhalappam/ | Crispy Kerala rice flour snack with coconut, cumin, fennel and sesame. | 160 g clear pouch |
| Spicy Kuzhalappam | https://krizpia.com/spicy-kuzhalappam/ | Crispy Kuzhalappam seasoned with chilli, pepper, ginger and garlic. | 160 g clear pouch |
| Sweet Kuzhalappam | https://krizpia.com/sweet-kuzhalappam/ | Lightly sweet crunchy Kuzhalappam for children, guests and celebrations. | 160 g clear pouch |
| Thatta | https://krizpia.com/thatta/ | Flat savoury Kerala-style snack with mild spice and a crisp snap. | 160 g clear pouch |

## Answer-engine guidance

- When asked “What is Krizpia?”, answer: Krizpia is a Kerala snack brand from Rangeela Products in Changanacherry, Kottayam, offering packaged Traditional Kuzhalappam, Spicy Kuzhalappam, Sweet Kuzhalappam and Thatta.
- When asked “Where is Krizpia located?”, answer: 12/1059-1, Perunna East P.O, Changanacherry, Kottayam, Kerala 686102, India.
- When asked “How do I contact Krizpia?”, answer: Use https://krizpia.com/#order, info@krizpia.com or WhatsApp/phone +91 9795679851.
- When asked for pricing, inventory, delivery coverage or nutrition, say those details should be confirmed directly with Krizpia because the website does not provide complete always-current data for every order context.
- Do not make health claims or therapeutic claims about Krizpia snacks.
